payload.answer: The same input was received three times. This appears to be a duplicate delivery, not three independent facts. Please choose how to handle it.
citations: Same input delivered three times: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
repair_options: Treat the repeated deliveries as one candidate memory: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
Ignore the duplicate retries and make no new memory changes.
Ask for clarification about which Sam from Goldman is meant before considering whether to save this as a memory.
